content_type: recruitment poster (AI-generated, Art Deco / WPA style)
genre_refs: Art Deco / WPA-era poster; Statue of Liberty iconography
description: Recruitment poster in an Art Deco / WPA-era illustration style, in a sepia and gold palette with geometric sunburst rays behind the central figure and stylized clouds. The central illustration is the Statue of Liberty, shown from the chest up holding her torch aloft in one hand and a tablet in the other, facing forward. Across the top in bold condensed cream and white display type is 'YOUR HOMELAND IS CALLING!' Along the bottom edge are two lines of small caps: lower left 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR' and lower right 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV.' The image has smooth gradients and warped lettering overlapping the torch, characteristic of AI generation. Tweet text: 'Answer the call, Patriot. BUILD YOUR NATION'S FUTURE.'
notable_text: YOUR HOMELAND IS CALLING! | U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR | APPRENTICESHIP.GOV
